product.name: OIAHOMY Cotton Rope Basket, Rectangle Woven Nursery Blanket Basket, Toy Storage Basket with Handle, Baskets for Organizing, 18”x14”x12”, Brown variegated
features: Popular Size:18" x 14" x 12", which perfect for throw pillows, cushions,blankets, comforter,toys and clothes.Keep in the kids room, family room, or any room in the house that could use extra storage: fits on a closet shelf, bookshelf or desk

Natural Cotton:OIAHOMY high quality laundry hamper is made of cotton Rope, No Chemical No Nasty No Disgusting Smell,Safe for Intimate Clothing.In addition,this clothes hamper is no sharp edges and a hard surface, safe for kids, elders,pets

Double reinforced Handles:We use the highest grade cotton rope as raw material and all the stitches are distribution and fine,which makes the baskets better wear resistance and durability to be used for many years.In addition, the handle of this large basket has a unique design and is wrapped around with thick double-layer suture rope to prevent tearing and keep its shape and never fall off
Collapsible Baskets:These rectangular storage baskets are foldable for easy to move and take away, simply fold the basket down flat for space-saving storage when not in use or to transport
NOTE: The toy basket is folded, but it will turn back to its elegant shape quickly if you fill it with some pillows or blankets, and iron is great idea to remove the creases
